'''Pillman''' was a company that specialized in the production of propulsion [[Engine/Legends|engines]] for use on small [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]]. Pillman engines were frequently seen on a variety of [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->[[Star Wars Screen Entertainment|''Star Wars'' Screen Entertainment]]
